markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX.ai as a partner for Talon.One's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** Talon.One's content team is a bottleneck, producing only 3–5 blogs/month and struggling to pivot from a "promotions engine" to a "loyalty platform" narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX.ai offers an 8-week Strategy Sprint to build a data-driven content roadmap, followed by a 12-month Growth Execution plan delivering 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use GrowthX.ai's data-backed strategy to align internal stakeholders and accelerate Talon.One's growth from $50M to $100M ARR.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Next Step:** A follow-up call is scheduled for Monday, Dec 15, to introduce GrowthX.ai to Talon.One's Head of Content and Product Marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2423.0)

## Topics

### Talon.One's Content Bottleneck

  - [**Growth Goal:** Scale from $50M to $100M ARR in 18–24 months.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Business Model:** Primarily inbound, making content the primary driver of brand and pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**Team Challenge:** The junior content team is a bottleneck, producing only 3–5 blogs/month and struggling to adopt modern AI-driven distribution strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shift the narrative from "promotions engine" to "loyalty platform" centered on "incentives marketing."](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [**Content Needs:**](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**Business Buyer:** Thought leadership on the broader ecosystem (partner marketing, integrations).](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
      - [**Technical Buyer:** Content positioning Talon.One as robust infrastructure for developers.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [**Competitors:**](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [**Pure-play:** Antavo, Voucherify (Talon.One aims to be the enterprise leader).](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [**Legacy:** Salesforce Loyalty Cloud, Adobe.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
      - [**Internal Builds:** Convince CTOs to buy instead of build.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Proposed Solution

  - [**8-Week Strategy Sprint ($30k fixed fee):**](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** A data-driven content roadmap ("Content OS") and 5–10 published articles to calibrate on quality.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
      - [**Goal:** Provide an objective, data-backed strategy to align internal stakeholders and resolve conflicting opinions.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1909.0)
  - [**12-Month Growth Execution ($9k–$15k/mo):**](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
      - [**Deliverable:** 5 net-new or refreshed articles per week, with GrowthX.ai handling all execution (staging, publishing, tracking).](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
      - [**Goal:** Scale content production and allow Talon.One's team to focus on high-impact projects while learning from GrowthX.ai's process.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [**Technology & Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Uses Scrunch (transitioning to a proprietary tool) for LLM monitoring and share-of-voice analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [**Infrastructure:** CMS-agnostic (Storyblok); uses Looker for analytics dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
      - [**GEO Strategy:** GrowthX.ai provides strategy and advice but does not execute on third-party channels (e.g., Reddit) due to risk.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler (GrowthX.ai):**](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2478.0)
      - [Send Rachel the pricing slide and Statement of Work (SoW).](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2478.0)
      - [Send a calendar invite for the follow-up meeting on Monday, Dec 15, at 10:00 AM Central / 4:00 PM BST.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2688.0)
  - [**Rachel (Talon.One):**](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2423.0)
      - [Add the Head of Content and a Product Marketing representative to the invite.](https://fathom.video/share/6Yp1shKy6SqfB4QVLYysW5BC_yDWXZxy?tab=summary&timestamp=2489.0)
